required_patterns.component-structure: All React components use TypeScript with explicit types
required_patterns.styling: Use shadcn/ui + Radix UI components with Tailwind CSS
required_patterns.client-components: Components requiring interactivity marked with 'use client'
required_patterns.form-handling: Forms use React 19 useActionState and useFormStatus hooks
required_patterns.state-management: Local state with useState, transitions with useTransition

architectural_constraints.import-patterns: Use @/ path alias for all internal imports
architectural_constraints.component-composition: Compose UI from shadcn/ui primitives, avoid custom base components
architectural_constraints.class-names: Use cn() utility for conditional class joining
architectural_constraints.drag-drop: Use @hello-pangea/dnd for drag and drop functionality

required_patterns.app-router: Use Next.js 14 App Router with file-based routing
required_patterns.layouts: Nested layouts for authentication and dashboard structure
required_patterns.server-components: Pages are server components by default

architectural_constraints.authentication: Dashboard routes protected by layout-level auth checks
architectural_constraints.redirects: Use next/navigation redirect for server-side redirects

required_patterns.orm: Use Prisma ORM exclusively for database operations
required_patterns.server-actions: All data mutations through Next.js server actions

architectural_constraints.prisma-instance: Create new PrismaClient() instance in each server action file
architectural_constraints.error-handling: Return { error, success, message } pattern from server actions
architectural_constraints.data-fetching: Include related data using Prisma include/select patterns
architectural_constraints.type-safety: Import types from generated Prisma client

required_patterns.session-management: Custom session-based auth with database tokens

architectural_constraints.logout-flow: Clear database session and cookie on logout
architectural_constraints.user-context: No global auth context, check auth per page/action

required_patterns.typography: Use defined font imports from lib/fonts.ts

architectural_constraints.color-system: Use semantic color tokens (primary, secondary, destructive, etc.)
architectural_constraints.component-forwarding: Use React.forwardRef for all UI components
architectural_constraints.slot-pattern: Support asChild prop using Radix Slot component
architectural_constraints.display-names: Set displayName for all forwarded components

required_patterns.feature-colocation: Group related pages, actions, and components by feature
required_patterns.server-action-files: Dedicated actions.ts files per feature route
required_patterns.component-separation: Separate UI components from page components

architectural_constraints.component-naming: Descriptive component names matching their purpose
architectural_constraints.import-organization: Group imports: React, Next.js, UI components, actions, types
architectural_constraints.file-extensions: Use .tsx for React components, .ts for utilities and actions
